currentFocus: PatchBench routing guards, shared reflected helper-output test support, and storage hygiene docs are integrated on main; docs/state now point the next executable slice at bounded PatchBench/BinaryPatchesPage presentation modularity hardening.

currentDocsTruth.integratedWave: Canonical docs/state summarize the PatchBench routing guard, shared reflected WinUI helper-output loader, and storage hygiene docs without treating local campaign reports, local worktree paths, or unreachable worker commits as durable public truth.
currentDocsTruth.stateReconciliation: goal.md, developer_agent_state.json, documentation_agent_state.json, and re_orchestrator_state.json record the integrated wave, the next bounded modularity slice, drive-level storage cleanup summary, retained Ghidra/proof non-deletion status, runtime future recommendation, and explicit non-claims.
currentDocsTruth.storageHygiene: LOCAL_LAB_OVERLAY.md explains disposable campaign/build/package scratch, final-report/local-manifest retention, scratch-device non-durability, manifest-required Ghidra/proof pruning, and do-not-touch boundaries for live Ghidra, installed game, original BEA.exe, current proof evidence, and protected backups.
currentDocsTruth.storageCloseoutSummary: Public-safe state records only drive-level before/after readings and category totals: 10.926 GiB old local campaign scratch cleaned; Ghidra backups and proof archives retained pending manifest/provenance or hash review.
currentDocsTruth.rebuildFrontDoor: ROADMAP-INDEX links the compact rebuild-front-door chain map. The map is routing/discoverability only and does not claim runtime, visual, gameplay, rebuild, or no-noticeable-difference parity.
currentDocsTruth.localOnlyBoundary: Hard payloads, screenshots/frame dumps, raw proof logs, copied executables, full Ghidra databases, secrets, .env* files, build output, package output, local runtime caches, raw proof evidence, and local proof paths stay out of tracked docs/state unless a public-safe summary is explicitly warranted.
currentDocsTruth.releasePublicationStatus: No release, tag, package, signing, installer, announcement, hosted workflow, or publication action is part of this integration.
currentDocsTruth.claimBoundary: Routing guard tests, shared reflected helper-output loading, storage hygiene docs, drive-level storage summary, and state reconciliation only; no AppCore, patch catalog row, byte patch, launch argument, safe-copy manifest/signature, runtime proof, release/publication, Host/Join, online readiness, runtime audio, gameplay, visual, rebuild, no-noticeable-difference, Ghidra, hard-payload, installed-game, or original-BEA mutation claim change.

currentCounters.catalogRows: 29/29 target specimen identity and policy metadata rows

validation.currentIntegration: Integration gates cover docs/repo, payload, WinUI build, focused PatchBench online-readiness UiTests, broader PatchBench/patch-engine safety, hard-payload, and primary-lane validation evidence.
validation.nextSlice: Prefer the bounded PatchBench/BinaryPatchesPage presentation modularity slice before broader page refactors.

nextSteps: Before the next write, verify live HEAD, origin/main, and remote refs/heads/main.
Keep docs and state free of local campaign paths and unreachable worker-commit dependencies.

Keep product, runtime, release publication, Host/Join, online readiness, runtime audio, gameplay, visual, rebuild, no-noticeable-difference, Ghidra, hard-payload, and installed-game mutation claims bounded to accepted evidence.
Keep local metadata cleanup and proof/Ghidra retention pruning as separate scoped maintenance work with manifests, dry-run evidence, and explicit authority.
